title: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North
meta_description: It's time to win together for Norwich North.
headings: h2: My Priorities for Norwich North
h3: As your MP, I will:
h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
text_excerpt: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Campaigns My Priorities for Norwich North During my election campaign, I set out my key priorities: Health, Homes, and Opportunity for the people of Norwich North. These remain at the heart of my work as your MP. Health Fixing Our Broken NHS Health and access to quality healthcare are the number one concerns I hear on the doorstep. The NHS has been left broken by the Tories and I am committed, alongside the new Labour government, to repairing it. Fighting to save the Norwich Walk-In Centre , which provides essential healthcare access. Addressing the “Sahara of dental deserts” by supporting a new dental school at UEA . My Health Campaign Homes Tackling the Housing Crisis Norwich is experiencing a housing crisis , with too many struggling to find affordable homes. I am pushing, alongside the Labour-led City Council and Clive Lewis MP , to ensure affordable housing is included in the redevelopment of Anglia Square . The new government is prioritizing house building , and I will work to ensure Norwich North gets its fair share of affordable homes. Housing Campaign Opportunity A Better Future for Our Children For far too long, equal opportunities for our children have been out of reach . I am committed to ensuring our education system delivers , especially for young people with additional needs . That’s why I am pushing for the repurposing of Angel Road Junior School as a specialist SEND school to support children with additional needs and ease the pressure on the system . Opportunity Campaign My Promise To You Trust in politics is at an all-time low and I can understand why many people simply don’t feel politics works for them. I will work my hardest to restore trust and show that politicians are not all the same. That’s why I have been out and about speaking to so many people across Norwich North to hear your concerns. As your MP, I will: Be your strong voice in parliament – speaking up on the issues that matter to you. Be a full-time MP – unlike many, I would never take a second job. Always listen to you – I hold regular constituency surgeries as well as being visible and accessible. Champion our great county and fine city – I’m proud to be from Norfolk and will stand up for investment in our area. And I’ll always be honest with you – I won’t make promises I can’t keep. Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norwich, NR1 3HL.
